description: Slight twist on the classic three-hole lace-up shoe with a clean, slim silhouette and a refined stacked heel, by arrow for men. The extra stitch detailing on the toe box of this narrow derby shoe gives it more interest – the shoe is a sartorialist's reinterpretation of the classic Derby. Wear this shoe crafted from Italian leather with slim Fit formal shirts and trousers. Upper Leather upper, has stitch detailing, with a tapering toe box Three-hole central lace-ups Padded leather lining Soft sockliner for instep comfort Padded tongue Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Branded grooves on the midfoot for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
